problem_text_cn: 一质点在半径为 $R$ 的圆柱表面等螺距螺旋线上作等速率运动，已知此螺旋线的曲率半径为 $\rho$，质点在垂直于轴平面内的投影的运动周期为 $T$，求质点作此螺旋线运动中沿轴方向的速度分量为多大？
problem_text_en: A particle moves at constant speed along a uniform-pitch helix on the surface of a cylinder with radius $R$. The radius of curvature of the helix is $\rho$, and the period of the particle's projection onto the plane perpendicular to the cylinder axis is $T$. Find the magnitude of the velocity component of the particle along the cylinder axis.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】设质点沿等螺距螺旋线运动的速度为 $v$，并设平行于圆柱轴方向的速度分量为 $v_{\parallel}$，垂直于此轴方向的速度分量为 $v_{\perp}$，有关系
$$
v = v_{\perp} + v_{\parallel} \tag{1}
$$
因质点在等螺距螺旋线上作等速率运动，所以三个速度值 $v$、$v_{\perp}$、$v_{\parallel}$ 均为常值，有关系
$$
v^2 = v_{\perp}^2 + v_{\parallel}^2 \tag{2}
$$

质点运动的加速度为
$$
\boldsymbol{a} = \frac{\Delta v}{\Delta t} = \frac{\Delta(v_{\perp} + v_{\parallel})}{\Delta t} = \frac{\Delta v_{\perp}}{\Delta t} \tag{3}
$$
因此，法向加速度可用两种形式写出
$$
a_n = \frac{v^2}{\rho} = \frac{v_{\perp}^2}{R} \tag{4}
$$
利用式(2)代入式(4)，解出
$$
v_{\parallel}^2 = \left(\frac{\rho}{R} - 1\right) v_{\perp}^2 \tag{5}
$$
利用垂直于圆柱轴平面内质点投影的圆周运动周期满足的关系式
$$
v_{\perp} = \frac{2\pi R}{T} \tag{6}
$$
联立式(5)和(6)，得到质点沿轴向速度分量的大小
$$
v_{\parallel} = \frac{2\pi}{T} \sqrt{R(\rho - R)}
$$
problem_solution_en:
【Analysis and Solution】Let the speed of the particle moving along the uniform-pitch helix be $v$, with velocity component $v_{\parallel}$ parallel to the cylinder axis and $v_{\perp}$ perpendicular to the axis:
$$
v = v_{\perp} + v_{\parallel} \tag{1}
$$
Since the particle moves at constant speed, $v$, $v_{\perp}$, and $v_{\parallel}$ are all constant, satisfying:
$$
v^2 = v_{\perp}^2 + v_{\parallel}^2 \tag{2}
$$

The acceleration of the particle is:
$$
\boldsymbol{a} = \frac{\Delta v}{\Delta t} = \frac{\Delta(v_{\perp} + v_{\parallel})}{\Delta t} = \frac{\Delta v_{\perp}}{\Delta t} \tag{3}
$$
Thus, the normal acceleration can be expressed in two ways:
$$
a_n = \frac{v^2}{\rho} = \frac{v_{\perp}^2}{R} \tag{4}
$$
Substituting (2) into (4) and solving for $v_{\parallel}^2$:
$$
v_{\parallel}^2 = \left(\frac{\rho}{R} - 1\right) v_{\perp}^2 \tag{5}
$$
Using the period $T$ of the projected circular motion in the plane perpendicular to the axis:
$$
v_{\perp} = \frac{2\pi R}{T} \tag{6}
$$
Combining (5) and (6), the magnitude of the axial velocity component is:
$$
v_{\parallel} = \frac{2\pi}{T} \sqrt{R(\rho - R)}
$$
img_cn:
质点在圆柱表面螺旋线运动的速度分解与加速度分析过程。

法向加速度的两种表达式及轴向速度分量的推导过程。
img_en:
Velocity decomposition and acceleration analysis for a particle moving along a helix on a cylinder surface.

Derivation of the axial velocity component using two expressions for normal acceleration.
problem_answer: 质点沿轴方向的速度分量大小为 $v_{\parallel} = \dfrac{2\pi}{T} \sqrt{R(\rho - R)}$。
